calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Richard Wise appearing for executor. The bank statement showed it is a POD account. The bank has no record of it being a POD account. Court is approving the final distribution of everything to the trustee. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2006 Continued To Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wise appearing for M. Romero.
The court directs Mr Wise to file a suplemental accounting including the Wells Fargo account.
The matter is continued to October 02, 2006.
Judicial Officer: Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Tina Paxton CSR #1558; Clerk: Rosie Noguera

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Continued To Sep-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Aug-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Richard Wise appearing for executor. Mr. Wise has not been able to get the signature card from Wells Fargo. He was told by the bank that there is no one else on the account. Court wants William Burgess to get a copy of the signature card and to file a disclaimer of the account. Matter is continued to 8/7. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Continued To Jul-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Richard Wise appearing for executor. Counsel will have to check the signature check with Wells Fargo. He will file an amendment to the petition. Matter is continued to 7/24. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.
